en: and they aren't getting close. Because they're not good at being good because they're bad.
The score they got on Earth is how good or bad they are.
ko: 지구에서 받은 점수가 그들이 얼마나 좋은지 나쁜지를 나타내.

en: Full stop. End of story. Then why did these four get better
over and over again in my neighborhood? Why did they help each other in ways they had never helped anyone on Earth?
I don't know. Maybe it's a fluke. Plus, you have zero proof they did get better.
You didn't keep track of their points. That's it!
I know what we have to do! Oh, you forgot we're still in the IHOP.
Anybody got eyes on Chidi? Help!
Help! Can someone grab my tiny boyfriend, please?
ko: 내 작은 남자친구 좀 잡아줄 수 있어?

en: I'm on it. Ah, here you go.
I just saw a trillion different realities
ko: 나는 방금 수조각 같은 얇은 금속 시트들이

en: folding onto each other like thin sheets of metal forming a single blade.
Yeah, yeah, the time knife. We've all seen it. Let's get back on track, bud.
ko: 그래, 그래, 시간의 칼, 우리 모두 봤어.
